# Experiment Relationship Map

| Question | Primary EXP | Comparator | Decision |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Does compression help? | EXP-001, EXP-014 | FTO vs SCC | Promote SCC if recall/effort improves without distortion. |
| Do bionic anchors help? | EXP-002, EXP-015 | SCC vs BCC | Promote BCC only if anchors add measurable value. |
| Is BCC+ better than BCC? | EXP-001, EXP-003, EXP-004, EXP-027 | BCC vs BCC+ | Promote BCC+ if placement/load/timing improve guardrail outcomes. |
| Where should text live? | EXP-003, EXP-018, EXP-028 | Bottom vs gaze-safe/platform-safe | Adopt per-context placement rules. |
| How much text? | EXP-004, EXP-014, EXP-021 | Fixed vs adaptive density/ratio | Set compression floors by audience and video type. |
| When should text appear? | EXP-005, EXP-024 | Pre-cue vs sync vs post | Set default semantic timing window. |
| Does motion help? | EXP-006, EXP-020 | Static/logical motion vs decorative motion | Use motion only when it encodes logic or tone. |
| Can it work muted? | EXP-007, EXP-021 | Muted variants | Use muted-first overlays for likely sound-off contexts. |
| Can we automate safely? | EXP-026, EXP-030 | Human vs automated routing/placement | Use human-in-loop until error rate is controlled. |
